title: Disabling "Add as new" for an Account column in Monday.com CRM new board
excerpt: hello, in our monday CRM, our users kept making the mistake of selecting “Add as new” when they are filling out a form on a column that is connected to the Accounts board. Does anyone have a solution on how to navigate a…

posts.author: jwang (JJ)
posts.cookedHtml:
hello, in our monday CRM, our users kept making the mistake of selecting “Add as new” when they are filling out a form on a column that is connected to the Accounts board. Does anyone have a solution on how to navigate around this or disable the “Add as new” button?

I have also explored other options like restricting editing the column, but it doesn’t work since it is created through the New Item form.
